market_validation_signal: Free trial to paid conversion jumped from 18% to 32% after onboarding email rewrite.
founder_action: Roll out the revised onboarding sequence to all new signups; track 30‑day retention impact.
risk_flag: Improvement may be seasonal; confirm trend sustains over 2‑3 months.

market_validation_signal: Waitlist hit 500 signups organically via niche subreddit post.
founder_action: Engage the community directly to deepen demand before opening access.
risk_flag: Community culture misalignment could lead to early churn.

market_validation_signal: Pilot feature usage exceeded expectations with avg. 4.5 daily sessions/user.
founder_action: Prioritise scaling backend to handle projected 5× load.
risk_flag: High engagement may drop if novelty wears off.

market_validation_signal: Customer interviews revealed 3 pain points not addressed in current roadmap.
founder_action: Re‑order roadmap to address top‑ranked pain point within 2 sprints.
risk_flag: Scope creep risk; avoid diluting core focus.

market_validation_signal: Test ads with rough mockup achieved 5% CTR vs. 1.2% industry avg.
founder_action: Build MVP landing page to capture leads immediately.
risk_flag: Mockup expectations may outpace actual MVP capabilities.

scrappy_tactic: Founder delivers surprise thank‑you packages to top 10 customers.
growth_trigger: Automate gifting once churn in top segment drops below 2%.

scrappy_tactic: Manually tags and segments every new customer in CRM by founder’s hand.
scalability_limit: 10 minutes/user max before it blocks other priorities.
growth_trigger: Automate tagging when segment definitions stabilise.

scrappy_tactic: Founder answers every inbound support ticket personally in first month.
scalability_limit: Max 50 tickets/day before slowing response times.
growth_trigger: Document top 20 answers into help centre before handoff.

scrappy_tactic: Organises in‑person meetups for first 25 customers.
scalability_limit: Venue & travel costs unsustainable past 3 events.

scrappy_tactic: Personally walks customers through competitor migration process.
growth_trigger: Record walkthrough video after 15 successful migrations.

runway_calc: 12 months runway post recent funding; burn stable.
cost_control: Negotiate annual vendor contracts at discounted rates.
revenue_path: Introduce small‑team pricing tier to capture emerging startups.

runway_calc: 5 months runway; new deal in negotiation may add 3 months.
revenue_path: Offer paid pilot extensions to existing enterprise clients.

runway_calc: 8 months runway at $50K burn; pipeline could extend by 6 months.
revenue_path: Launch referral program with discounted annual plans.

runway_calc: 3 months runway; high churn threatening cash flow.
revenue_path: Aggressively upsell to top 20% most engaged users.

cost_control: Consolidate SaaS tools to remove redundancy.
revenue_path: Beta‑launch enterprise API for higher MRR.

constraint_hack: Used free credits from cloud startup program to delay infra spend.
obstacle_map: Initial infra cost too high for MVP testing.

constraint_hack: Partnered with local college to get interns for data labeling.
next_move: Set up repeat internship program to maintain cost advantage.

constraint_hack: Hacked together CRM using spreadsheet + free automation tools.
next_move: Replace with custom solution after first 50 customers.

constraint_hack: Repurposed retired laptops for in‑house test rigs.
next_move: Expand rig pool as hardware donations arrive.

constraint_hack: Used barter to secure influencer shout‑outs without cash outlay.
next_move: Systematise barter deals into monthly pipeline.

impact_metric: Top 2 features drive 80% of daily active usage.
distraction_flag: Avoid chasing competitor features with <5% demand.

impact_metric: NPS survey identified onboarding as top driver of satisfaction.
priority_shift: Dedicate next sprint to onboarding UX improvements.
distraction_flag: Ignore cosmetic changes until retention stabilises.

impact_metric: Revenue from enterprise clients exceeds SMB by 5×.
priority_shift: Focus BD efforts on enterprise vertical.
distraction_flag: Limit SMB support to templated solutions.

impact_metric: Churn rate improved by 15% from proactive outreach program.
priority_shift: Scale program to cover entire base.
distraction_flag: Avoid building new retention tool until core process is mature.

impact_metric: 90% of feature requests align with one planned module.
priority_shift: Fast‑track that module into current sprint.
distraction_flag: Do not fragment dev focus with minor features.

adjacent_opportunity: Regional expansion into under‑served APAC countries.
entry_risk: Localization costs may eat early profits.

market_size: $900M niche with clear path to $4B adjacent.
adjacent_opportunity: Leverage same tech in adjacent insurance market.
